items.shape_or_design: flat chain with intricate floral and circular motifs and a decorative pendant-like design
items.rationale: Medium confidence from visual cues, weight estimated conservatively for a moderately heavy traditional flat chain necklace with designs and pendant section. Purity assumed likely 22K as typical for traditional Indian gold jewelry. Values based on 22K gold rate INR 12435/g, including making charges approximated.

High visual confidence of small floral stud earrings, estimated lightweight typical for stud earrings of this style. Purity likely 22K as per traditional Indian gold norms. Values conservatively calculated from 22K gold rate plus estimated making charges.

items.shape_or_design: cylindrical stack of multiple bangles with decorative patterns
items.rationale: High confidence these are three traditional gold bangles, heavier than necklace or earrings. Weight estimated conservatively due to obscured details and overlap. Purity assumed likely 22K typical for traditional Indian bangles. Value computed using 22K gold rate with making charges.

assumptions: Using Goodreturns 22K gold rate of INR 12435 per gram as conservative market rate reference.
Including making charges broadly estimated in value ranges.
Purity assumed likely 22K based on traditional Indian jewellery styles and yellow gold appearance.
Weight ranges conservatively estimated from visible size, style, and typical jewelry weights.
Count of bangles assumed 3 based on visible cylindrical stack with some overlap and image clarity.
Chain and pendant treated as single necklace piece due to overlapping and unclear separation.
